_description: Audit log: x100 time-conversion bug fix for data/league-results.json (current season). Criterion: time >= 100 AND (time%100) < 60. relay-results.json excluded — all 144 rows are 200m relay events whose legitimate times (127-230s) overlap with x100 artifact range; cannot be mechanically distinguished without source PDFs. relay-results.json is a separate manual-verification task. HISTORY BATCH (2026-07-16): Also corrects league-results-history.json (1284 rows) and relay-results-history.json (107 rows) using corrected criterion time>=100 AND (time%100)<60.

_excluded.relay-results.json: All 144 rows are 200m relay events. Legitimate relay times (2:07-3:50) and x100 artifacts occupy the same 127-230s range. 65 rows have t%100>=60 (definitively NOT x100 artifacts). 75 rows have t%100<60 (ambiguous — could be legitimate 2:07-2:58 relays). Requires source-document verification.
_excluded.Peters Lorelei|100m Individual Medley|20: t%100=65.11>=60 — cannot be x100 artifact. Legitimate 2:45.11 IM time stored as decimal seconds. Left untouched.

history_batch._relay_history_rationale: relay-results-history.json included (unlike current-season relay-results.json) because stored values range 158-338 with a clear gap at 159-200. No legitimate 200m relay would fall in 160-200s stored range without also appearing at continuous values below 160 — the gap proves these are exclusively x100 artifacts. All 107 rows have t%100<60. Corrected range: 118-218s (plausible 200m relay times).
